title: polkit bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.117-14.0.1]
- Increase timeout to avoid defunct processes [Orabug: 26930744]

[0.117-14]
- aarch64: test failure with undefined symbol: __aarch64_ldadd4_acq_rel
- Resolves: RHEL-98662
